title: Support - Device page with headset disconnected
scenario: Device details modal fails to display when navigating to Menu > Support > [Device] for a disconnected headset visible on the Home Screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure a headset is disconnected but visible (listed under 'Disconnected' or similar).
3. Tap the Menu icon (three horizontal lines or hamburger menu) in the top-left or top-right corner.
5. In the Support screen, tap on the disconnected device name (e.g., [Device Name]).
expected: A modal is displayed showing the following device details: Device Name, Product ID, Serial Number, Software Version, Headset Revision, and Last Connected. The modal also includes a 'Go' button for sending support information.
